programme.title: Next Stop Ep211: Kauai, Hawaii
programme.desc: Next Stop tours Jurassic Park Waterfall (aka Manawaiopuna Falls) via helicopter, kayaks with Outfitters Kauai, and goes tubing with Kauai Backcountry Adventures.

programme.title: Mapping The Blue: World's largest Marine Park
programme.desc: The Cook Islands recently announced the designation of the largest Marine Park on Earth. In stunning 4K imagery, this documentary tells the story of how Kevin Iro, founder of the park, along with his team, use a high tech GIS system to designate multi-use areas inside the pristine park.

programme.title: Sports Adventure Ep510: Kayaking the Remote Sary-Jaz River in China's Tien Shan Mountains
programme.desc: The Sickline Kayaking Team travels to the remote Sary-Jaz River, located in the Tien Shan Mountains, which straddle the borders of China, Kazakhstan, and Kyrgyzstan. Expedition leader Tomass Marnics, along with several World Champion kayakers kayak the breathtaking Eyes of God Gorge.

programme.title: Travel Quest Ep110: Botswana
programme.desc: Botswana is a wildlife lover’s dream and it’s also the home of Victoria Falls…the largest waterfalls in the world. Travel Quest's host, Bill Ball, joined a whitewater raft team in order to film the most wild and treacherous rapids in the world. He would not leave unscathed.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep103: Plastics Pollution
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep112: Hunting for Megalodon Shark Teeth
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV goes on a hunt for Megalodon Shark teeth and takes a Deeper Dive with Megalodon Sharks, Prickly Sharks, and Sand Tiger Sharks.

programme.title: Xplash Ep111
programme.desc: The Xplash action is intense as we kayak Africa's Zambezi River, go behind-the-scenes of Australia's V8 Powerboat Racing, and head north to the icy waters of Canada and Alaska for coldwater surfing.

programme.title: The Bassquatch Hunter: The Fishing Was on FIRE!
programme.desc: Mike got to live out a childhood dream of being a fireman for a day! After taking firefighter, and military veteran, Jeff Latkowski fishing in the kayaks, Jeff showed Mike what it takes to be a firefighter in the agility course that truly tests what you're made of.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep211: Kauai, Hawaii
programme.desc: Next Stop tours Jurassic Park Waterfall (aka Manawaiopuna Falls) via helicopter, kayaks with Outfitters Kauai, and goes tubing with Kauai Backcountry Adventures.

programme.title: Mapping The Blue: World's largest Marine Park
programme.desc: The Cook Islands recently announced the designation of the largest Marine Park on Earth. In stunning 4K imagery, this documentary tells the story of how Kevin Iro, founder of the park, along with his team, use a high tech GIS system to designate multi-use areas inside the pristine park.

programme.title: Sports Adventure Ep510: Kayaking the Remote Sary-Jaz River in China's Tien Shan Mountains
programme.desc: The Sickline Kayaking Team travels to the remote Sary-Jaz River, located in the Tien Shan Mountains, which straddle the borders of China, Kazakhstan, and Kyrgyzstan. Expedition leader Tomass Marnics, along with several World Champion kayakers kayak the breathtaking Eyes of God Gorge.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Vivid
programme.desc: Absinthe Films’ Vivid highlights the breakout years of Travis Rice, Romain De Marchi, Nicolas Müller, and Gigi Rüf, delivering some of their most memorable early riding in a fan-favorite classic.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Scott Lenhardt
programme.desc: Artist Scott Lenhardt has kept everything he’s ever made for Burton Snowboards. Everything he’s ever done is stored in his childhood bedroom. After his year-long solo show at the Vermont Ski Snowboard Museum, he organized his archives. Just like his creative process, this film is mind blowing.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Sebo Walker
programme.desc: In 2022, the art-inspired accessories brand Slowtide launched a summer collection with Portland, Oregon-based artist and skateboarder Sebo Walker. To capture the collaboration, director Jake Price spent a day cruising around Walker’s hometown, seeing the city and learning what inspires his artwork.

programme.title: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: ‘Without a Paddle’ is a canoe film about snowboarding. Four snowboarders retrace a portion of the 19th century explorer David Thompson’s journey down the Columbia River, during one of the coldest cold snaps in Revelstoke’s recorded history. Surreal landscapes, epic paddling, deep powder, and pain.

programme.title: Without a Pedal
programme.desc: Snowboarding Alaska the hard way. An epic winter bike trip down Canada’s Cassiar Highway turns into a test of survival, obsession, and how far you’ll go for the dream.

programme.title: Northbound and Around
programme.desc: Hungry for clips and greedy for turns, Johan Rosen, Garrett “Worm” Warnick and friends spent the season leaving no line unridden and no pillow unsmashed. Driven by the most unsatisfiable of desires, finding good snow, the crew spent the season running from warm temperatures and chasing down a dream. To get to the promised land, they found themselves traveling… Northbound and Around. Featuring: Garrett Warnick, Johan Rosen, Nils Arvidsson, Ryan Paterson, Keenan Filmer, Kareem El Rafie Nils Mindnich, Jess Kimura, Bode Merrill, Ben Bilocq, Brandon Davis, Nick Khattar, Kyle Mack Edited by: Johan Rosen

programme.title: CHANNEL ZeRO
programme.desc: Released in 2020, this Absinthe Films feature highlights the unifying power of snowboarding during a divisive moment in history, celebrating a global community that refuses to be separated by physical or mental barriers.

programme.title: Standing Ovation
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 01
programme.desc: Jamie Lynn is an introvert. In his snowboarding and art-making, however, he’s big and expressive. Watch Episode 1 of his legendary Microdose series. Featuring Circe Wallace, Mike Hatchett, Sean Sullivan, Temple Cummins, Jason Loeb, Micah Shapiro, Colter Gerber, Apostalos and Demetrius Karabotsos.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 02
programme.desc: In Episode 2 of the Jamie Lynn series, Jamie talks about how the creativity of the artists and skateboarders Mark Gonzales and Neil Blender guides his approach to life as a snowboarder and artist. Featuring Circe Wallace, Matt Cummins, Dano Pendygrasse, Joel Gomez, Scott Sullivan, and Matt Remine.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 03
programme.desc: In Episode 3 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, we talk with a pioneering professional snowboarder and filmmaker, an iconic 90s shredder, and a Tahoe photographer about Jamie Lynn. Join us for tales of guts, gusto, and good jumping genes. Featuring Dave Seoane, Peter Line, and Ruben Sanchez.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 04
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series we talk with a handful of Jamie’s fellow athletes and industry peers about his loyalties to Sessions, Volcom, Vans, and LibTech among other sponsors. Featuring Joel Gomez, Dave Seoane, Richard Woolcott, Bryan Iguchi, Mike Parillo, and Billy Anderson.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 05
programme.desc: In Episode 5 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, Terje Haakonsen shares his insights on Mr. Lynn. From annual meet-ups at Mt. Baker to destinations around the world, Terje takes you there. Featuring Terje Haakonsen, Bryan Iguchi, Richard Woolcott, Ryan Immegart, Mike Parillo, and Troy Eckert.

programme.title: Jack of All Tastes
programme.desc: Jack of All Tastes is hosted by Jackie Long and powered by famous athletes and unique eateries. Follow Jackie as he journeys from city to city and dines with NFL athletes and their significant others. Today it is New York.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: In this episode we’ll be flying back to Europe, to watch the 2019 Formula Kite European Championships in Italy. Taking place in the Mediterranean track, Oristano Gulf welcomes kiteboarding in an event that will be as plastic free as possible. For all the athletes from the 22 countries participating, anticipation is high as this is the 4th major event for athletes in less than two months.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: The last stop takes place on the magnificent island of Sardinia and the city of Cagliari. This is the third successive year that the Sardinian capital of Cagliari has hosted the series, where intense battles in the cutting-edge kiteboarding discipline will again be fought out on the Gulf of Angels off the pristine Poetto Beach.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 5
programme.desc: For its fifth event of the sixth season, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans were invited to visit Muscat for the final event of the 2019 GC32 Racing Tour, the GC32 Oman Cup. The event, held in Muscat, has been jointly organized by Oman Sail and the host venue partners EFG Private Banking as well as fragrance brand Amouj and the Sultanate of Oman Ministry of Tourism. The Oman Cup was the final of the 2019 GC32 Racing Tour and will decide this year’s overall podium places. Unquestionably the big fight was for top spot between the local heroes Oman Air and Ernesto Bertarelli’s World Champions Alinghi.With so many teams close on the leader board, there was the potential for some crucial match races amongst the fleet.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 9
programme.desc: Welcome back sailors! Today we are indulging in the most fragrant gardens of the islands of Cres and Losinj where the beauty of nature is next level. These islands are also known as the favourite place for many boaters who like to enjoy beautiful beaches and top restaurants. Let's dive in!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 10
programme.desc: In this episode we are in the Opatija Riviera - the jewel box of the Northern Adriatic. With its enchanting architecture and romantic seaside promenades, it instantly takes us back to glorious summer days of the historical elite and royals. Now, let us take you here in Sail-Ho Croatia!

programme.title: Hempel World Cup Series - Palma de Mallorca
programme.desc: Welcome to the 51st Trofeo Princesa Sofía regatta in Palma de Mallorca! More than a thousand of accomplished sailing athletes compete in the first Hempel World Cup Series regatta of the new Olympic cycle. As the start of the European racing season, a great sense of urgency and enthusiasm can be felt among competitors, and as a vital event, we are eager to see how their training has gone over the winter.

programme.title: Añoranzas de mi Madre
programme.desc: Ana, una mujer ambiciosa, arrogante y sin escrúpulos ha perdido el verdadero significado de la vida, de los sentimientos y de la Naturaleza misma.

programme.title: Utopía 7
programme.desc: En un mundo postapocalíptico, una pandilla de jóvenes rebeldes lucha contra los mecanismos de alta tecnología de un sistema informático definitivo que había sido encargado por un grupo de élite para restablecer el orden y el equilibrio.

programme.title: Expediente 53
programme.desc: Esta es una historia de misterio y acción en la ciudad de Bryan Texas el comandante Gatel pide la ayuda del FBI ya que hay muchos desaparecidos, y asesinatos en la ciudad. Los agentes Gutiérrez, Bracho y Miravalle del FBI le comentan al comandante Gatel que ellos sospechan que puede ser obra de una secta satánica y que el líder es un demonio de nombre Abal que está en el cuerpo de una bella mujer de nombre Lilly.

programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: El Mariachi Gringo
programme.desc: Comedia romántica sobre un joven de la América profunda que -tras tener como improvisado maestro de guitarra a un emigrante- viaja a México huyendo de su vida tediosa y de su familia, para ejercitarse como mariachi.

programme.title: Canon: Fidelidad al Límite
programme.desc: Mariana de 35 años, es una arquitecta que trabaja y es socia de un importante despacho de arquitectos, está casada con Julián de 40 años, quien es corresponsal de guerra. Está enamorados, felices, con relación sexual cotidiana. Son padre de dos hijos de 14 y 17 año. En el juego sexual, Julián menciona que no le importaría la infidelidad a condición de estar enterado del hecho con detalles.

programme.title: Bendita Calamidad
programme.desc: Los hermanos Fayos, Anselmo y Ricardo, están con el agua al cuello. Su bar no funciona, el Ayuntamiento lo clausura y se ha agotado el dinero que, para ir tirando, solicitaron a unos prestamistas que no se andan con contemplaciones a la hora de cobrar. Piden consejo a un abogado poco amigo de la ley, Antonio Orestes, que les sugiere una vía rápida para acabar con sus problemas: El secuestro exprés de un constructor de Tarazona.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
